display_name: MCS PMSM NT Common Controller Settings
description: Platform-independent controller contract shared by every mcs_pmsm_nt implementation. Hardware timing, sensing and peripheral bindings remain in each project SDPE requirement.

code_sections.after_extern_open: /* Platform-independent settings only. Project hardware is supplied by the including project header. */
code_sections.before_footer:
/* Accept the historical misspelling while all source code uses the canonical switch. */
#if defined ENBALE_GMP_DL_PIL_SIM && !defined ENABLE_GMP_DL_PIL_SIM
#define ENABLE_GMP_DL_PIL_SIM
#endif

/* Reject unsupported incremental build levels at preprocessing time. */
#if (BUILD_LEVEL < 1) || (BUILD_LEVEL > 4)
#error "BUILD_LEVEL must be 1 (V/f), 2 (current loop/synthetic angle), 3 (current loop/encoder), or 4 (speed loop)."
#endif

feature_macros.description: Use the discrete controller implementation instead of the default continuous controller path.
Enable the existing discrete-PID anti-saturation debug path.
Enable the sliding-mode observer path. Disabled to preserve the current sensored-control build.
Calibrate ADC offsets before enabling normal control.
Enable processor-in-the-loop mode and suppress direct PWM controller output.
Use active-low PWM modulation for the selected inverter gate path.
Use the three-level NPC modulator. Disabled for the two-level three-phase inverter.

option_macros.description: Incremental commissioning level. 1: V/f voltage open loop; 2: current loop with synthetic electrical angle; 3: current loop with encoder angle; 4: speed loop with encoder feedback.

requirements.description: Controller startup delay in milliseconds.
Main motor-control ISR frequency in hertz.
Minimum absolute phase current in amperes before PWM dead-time compensation selects a current direction. Converted to PU with CTRL_CURRENT_BASE at initialization.
Phase-current hysteresis band in amperes used to prevent dead-time compensation direction chatter around zero current.
Electrical frequency command in hertz used by the BUILD_LEVEL 1 V/f path and the BUILD_LEVEL 2 synthetic-angle current-loop path.
Maximum electrical-frequency slew rate in hertz per second for the synthetic angle generator.
Position-loop proportional gain. Input is mechanical position error in PU revolutions and output is speed reference in PU, so the gain is speed_pu/position_pu.
Position-loop integral gain in speed_pu/(position_pu*s). The continuous gain is divided by the mechanical-loop sampling frequency internally.
Velocity-loop proportional gain. Input is speed error in PU and output is q-axis current/torque reference in PU, so the gain is current_pu/speed_pu.
Velocity-loop integral gain in current_pu/(speed_pu*s). The continuous gain is divided by the mechanical-loop sampling frequency internally.
Absolute mechanical speed-command limit in rpm. It is divided by MOTOR_PARAM_MAX_SPEED to obtain the controller PU limit.
Maximum mechanical speed-command slew rate in rpm/s. The configured value corresponds to 1 PU/s for the selected 3000 rpm motor.
Absolute q-axis current/torque command limit in amperes. It is divided by CTRL_CURRENT_BASE to obtain the controller PU limit; 3 A corresponds to the previous 0.3 PU setting.
Cutoff frequency in hertz of the low-pass filter applied to encoder-derived mechanical speed.
D-axis current reference in amperes used by BUILD_LEVEL 2 and 3 commissioning. Converted to PU using CTRL_CURRENT_BASE.
Q-axis current reference in amperes used by BUILD_LEVEL 2 and 3 commissioning. Converted to PU using CTRL_CURRENT_BASE.
Mechanical speed reference in rpm used by BUILD_LEVEL 4 commissioning. Converted to PU using MOTOR_PARAM_MAX_SPEED.
Minimum delay in milliseconds before the CiA402 state machine enters Operation Enabled. The project control tick is expressed in milliseconds.
Cutoff frequency in hertz of the second-order low-pass filter used while estimating ADC zero offsets.
Quality factor of the ADC calibration low-pass filter; 0.707 gives an approximately Butterworth second-order response.
Legacy loop-convergence epsilon retained for controller compatibility.
